---
title: "partner_a_task"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library("tidyverse")
yeast_genome <- read_csv("yeast_genome_metadata.csv") %>%
  filter (genome_size_mb > 12) %>%
  mutate(log_depth = log(sequencing_depth)) %>%
  select (gc_content, genome_size_mb, sequencing_depth) %>%
  write_csv("partner_a_filtered.csv")

yeast_genome_matrix <- as.matrix(yeast_genome) 

write.csv(yeast_genome_matrix, "partner_a_matrix.csv")

mean_gc_content <- mean(yeast_genome_matrix[,"gc_content"])
mean_gc_content
```
